name: Week 6 KB Full Body (Explore)
description: New flow day! B-Stance Flow (@Asgooch) replaces OTD — unilateral, don't put the bell down, includes your first snatch work. Start at 20lb to learn transitions. Bent press at 30 for real. TGU at 30 — left side is the project. C&P pushing for 8 reps.

sets.name: Block 1: B-Stance Flow (@Asgooch)

exercises.notes: B-stance: one foot back, heel up. Swing between legs, explosive hip drive. Bell swings up to about chest height.
→ On the next swing, CATCH it directly into rack position at your shoulder. Don't dead stop — ride the momentum into the clean.
→ Bell is in rack. Stay in B-stance (back foot heel still up). Squat down and stand back up. Bell stays at shoulder.
→ From rack, punch the bell straight overhead in one motion. Lock out arm, stand tall. This is the split stance snatch — you're still in B-stance when it goes up.
→ Bell locked out overhead, step forward into a lunge. Stand straight up from the lunge with arm STILL locked overhead. That's 1 rep of the full flow.

sets.notes: NEW FLOW: B-Stance Flow (@Asgooch). 5 reps each side × 5 rounds. Don't put the bell down between moves — it's one continuous chain. Start at 20lb to learn the transitions, especially the swing clean and split stance snatch. Video: https://x.com/Asgooch/status/2026011472489324584

exercises.notes: 30lb. W5: first attempt at 30. If W5 was solid, push for 5 reps per side. If shaky, stay at 3.
45lb goblet. Full depth, heels down, sit in the hole for a beat.
25lb. Solid and comfortable. If 25 is genuinely easy, try 30 on last set.
30lb. Left side: pause at elbow prop, hand prop, hip bridge. Right side is the template — match it on the left. If 30 is smooth both sides, try 35 on a single rep.
50lb. W5: did 6 (down from target 8 due to shoulder). This week fresh: push for 8. Catch with knee bend, full lockout.
50lb. Easy at 50 — slow it down. 2-second pull, 2-second lower.
50lb. Pause at bottom for 1 second. Max KB weight.
50lb. Full hip snap. Save the circuit for Saturday if you want it.

tips: B-Stance Flow: 5 reps each side × 5 rounds. Watch the video first: https://x.com/Asgooch/status/2026011472489324584
20lb to learn. The transitions are the workout — swing → catch into rack → squat → punch overhead → lunge → stand up arm locked.
Swing clean = catching a full swing into rack. Split stance snatch = punch overhead while still in B-stance.
Bent press at 30: this is week 2 at this weight. Should feel more controlled.
TGU left side: the project continues. Smooth > fast.
C&P: 8 reps is the goal. You hit 6 when tired last week. Fresh = 8.
No circuit finisher — save that for Saturday Refine if you want it.
